content: Tiny Tina's Assault on Dragon Keep
name: Fire Storm
description:
Fire Storm is a Legendary spell-style grenade mod made by Maliwan, introduced in the Tiny Tina's Assault on Dragon Keep add-on for Borderlands 2.

It hits harder than similar spell grenades like Fireball or Lightning Bolt. It is at its best in tight areas, where the initial blast and the four follow-up impacts often overlap and catch targets nearby. Be careful at close range, as the large splash can easily down you or allies.
notes: Its red text nods to Tim the Enchanter from Monty Python and the Holy Grail.

special.description: Launches a fireball straight ahead that explodes on impact. The impact then calls down 4 meteors that strike the ground for fire damage. Grenades regenerate over time.
special.title: What manner of man are you that can summon up fire without flint or tinder?
